name: empty-rfonts
description: Paragraph style sets all 4 font slots (Georgia, MS Gothic, Tahoma). Direct rPr has <w:rFonts/> with no attributes.
expected_behavior: Empty rFonts should be a no-op; font_family='Georgia' from style, font_east_asia='MS Gothic', font_cs='Tahoma'.
current_status: GAP-131 — empty rFonts may clear inherited values
